description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, perform region-specific statistical analysis on the Landsat multi-spectral image located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (band_1=SWIR1, band_2=NIR, band_3=Red, band_4=Green). Create a logical mask named 'veg_mask' to isolate vegetated pixels using the expression: band_2 > band_3. Compute statistics for all four spectral bands using 'veg_mask' as the ROI/Mask constraint. Export the statistics report to /home/ga/snap_exports/veg_statistics.txt and save the product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/masked_landsat.dim.
